scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared-types && npm run build -w packages/content-parsers && npm run build -w apps/docs-api && npm run build -w apps/docs-web
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/docs-api" "npm run dev -w apps/docs-web"
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/shared-types && npm run test -w packages/content-parsers && npm run test -w apps/docs-api && npm run test -w apps/docs-web
scripts.lint: npm run build -w packages/shared-types && npm run build -w packages/content-parsers && npm run lint -w apps/docs-api && npm run lint -w apps/docs-web && npm run lint -w packages/shared-types && npm run lint -w packages/content-parsers
